name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete SDLC workflow as four skill-mode routers plus the wf-design router and a setup-wide-logging command. /wf executes the canonical 13-stage lifecycle (shape, slice, plan, implement, verify, review, handoff, ship, retro) plus four perf/observability augmentations (instrument, experiment, benchmark, profile). /wf-quick starts compressed flows (quick, rca, investigate, discover, hotfix, update-deps, refactor, ideate, simplify) with no-flag positional slug detection against the global registry `.ai/workflows/INDEX.md`. v9.11.0 extends INDEX.md to four more read-side surfaces: `/wf-meta status/resume/next` enumerate from the registry instead of globbing, `/wf intake` gained registry-grounded collision detection (AskUserQuestion on duplicate slug; closed slugs cannot be reused), and `/wf` gained a centralized Step 0.5 fuzzy-suggest that catches typo'd slugs across the 13 slug-consuming sub-commands. /wf-meta navigates and manages existing workflows (next, status, resume, sync, amend, extend, skip, close, how, announce). /wf-design dispatches across 22 design sub-commands (shape, craft, audit, critique, plus 15 transformations and 3 setup/extract operators). /review runs per-dimension or named-sweep code review across 31 dimensions and 7 sweeps via parallel sub-agent dispatch. The wf-validate pre-write hook gates artifact writes against schema. Workflow-type aware: compressed mode (workflow-type: quick → reads 01-quick.md), forwarded mode (workflow-type: rca/investigate → reads 01-rca.md/01-investigate.md as rich context behind the synthesized 02-shape.md), standard mode (per-slice files). No-optional-artifacts policy enforced: every stage's Conditional Inputs row is mandatory when present. Per-slice review artifacts (07-review-<slice>.md + 07-review-<slice>-<command>.md) so reviewing a second slice never overwrites the first. wf-handoff refuses to proceed if any per-slice review has unresolved blockers. Augmentations register on 00-index.md and produce type-specific deliverables that downstream stages consume: instrument adds 04b-instrument.md signals; experiment writes 04c-experiment.md cohort/rollback design; benchmark writes 05c-benchmark.md baseline/compare; design-* writes design-notes/<sub>-<timestamp>.md and 02b-design.md / 02c-craft.md visual contracts. v9.0.0-alpha.4 collapsed the 13 lifecycle slash commands into the /wf skill router; alpha.3 collapsed 10 lifecycle-navigation commands into /wf-meta; alpha.2 collapsed 10 standalone-workflow commands into /wf-quick; alpha.1 collapsed 38 review slash commands into the /review skill. Release notes for every v8.x feature live in CHANGELOG.md.

interface.shortDescription: Structured feature delivery, review, and handoff workflows
interface.longDescription: Guided SDLC orchestration for intake, shaping, slicing, planning, implementation, verification, review, handoff, shipping, and retrospectives. Codex exposes the canonical Claude workflow commands through generated skill wrappers so the workflow stays installable without forking the source plugin.
defaultPrompt: Start a new SDLC workflow for this feature request.
Run the next SDLC stage for my active workflow.
Review this workflow slice and summarize the findings.
